Master Programs

The Aim of the Program

Okan Homepage

Child Development and Education Program

The Aim of the Program

MENU

Child Development and Education Program; Developmental support, education that can evaluate the cognitive, language, motor, social, emotional, self-care skills of children between the ages of 0-18 who are normally developing, with special needs, acute and chronic diseases, in need of protection and under developmental risk, developmental screening and definition is capable of preparing, implementing, evaluating intervention programs, providing consultancy to the family of the child in line with their needs with "Family Centered" practices, working in cooperation with professionals working in this field, highly equipped, willing to learn lifelong, able to renew themselves in line with the changing and developing needs of the society aims to train a "Child Development Specialist" who can develop, communicate effectively, have developed critical thinking skills, are creative, productive and give importance to ethical values.
